# subreg_domain (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `autorenew` (Boolean) Whether the domain should auto-renew.
- `domain` (String) Registered domain to manage.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
